title: Pebble
summary: A street-bred courier and thief caught between Dragon's Breath's criminal cover business and the corrupt officers now hunting him.
concept: Underworld runner whose survival skills expose the link between laundering fronts and compromised law.
partyRole: stealth / street contacts / smuggling routes / underworld intelligence

background.origin: Grew up in a small orphanage in the city, ran away, and survived on the streets by stealing.
background.history: Pebble built a network among street contacts and now works under Spice at Dragon's Breath, a spice shop that covers money laundering and other dirty business. Around him are Granit, a cold dwarf cleanup specialist, and Silt, a younger goblin he feels protective toward. His work includes shadowing targets, delivering stolen or illegal goods, and planting false evidence. A routine delivery became a trap when checkpoint officers closed in under orders, forcing him into a humiliating rooftop escape. Later fallout tied that danger to Harker Venn, a violent Shield Marshal linked to Granit's past and to the larger corruption web.
background.incitingIncident: A routine delivery turned into a staged checkpoint trap, proving that corrupt law and criminal money were coordinating against him.
background.reasonInCity: Alkenstar is his home turf, his livelihood, and the only place where his contacts can still keep him alive.

currentSituation.overview: Still moving through the underworld after a rooftop escape, but now increasingly visible to both corrupt officers and the people who own his work.
currentSituation.legalStatus: At risk of arrest after humiliating officers and fleeing a staged checkpoint.
currentSituation.socialStatus: Useful underworld courier with fragile loyalties and dangerous recognition risk.
currentSituation.currentProblem: If Harker Venn identifies him, word can reach Granit and expose both his movements and his current allies.

goals.shortTerm: Stay ahead of the crackdown and learn who ordered the checkpoint on his delivery.
goals.midTerm: Figure out how deep Dragon's Breath is tied into laundering, dirty law, and the wider corruption web.
goals.longTerm: Survive the underworld without becoming fully owned by it, and turn what he knows against the network using him if he gets the chance.

spotlight.gmNotes: Use Pebble in chases, courier jobs, checkpoint tension, false-evidence setups, and scenes where underworld relationships become painfully personal.

relationshipNotes.label: Spice
relationshipNotes.note: Quiet criminal operator who offers structure more than kindness.

relationshipNotes.label: Granit
relationshipNotes.note: Cleanup specialist Pebble respects but does not trust.

relationshipNotes.label: Silt
relationshipNotes.note: Goblin co-worker Pebble protects and feels kinship toward.

relationshipNotes.label: Harker Venn
relationshipNotes.note: Violent Shield Marshal whose sighting could expose Pebble to both law and underworld retaliation.

campaignFitSummary: Strongly tied to the criminal underground, laundering fronts, compromised officers, and the street-level logistics of corruption. Best used in chase, infiltration, courier, and underworld-pressure scenes.
notes: Ancestry, age, and exact class are not established in the current notes. Pebble's underworld role is clear even without a locked mechanical build.

relations.note: Employer whose legitimate-looking shop hides money laundering and other criminal work.
Protective bond that gives Pebble a personal stake inside Dragon's Breath.
The staged checkpoint proved the city and underworld are coordinating around his route.
